title: Eyes on the Prize
scenario: Create a visually appealing product description for a new smart glasses product. The target audience is middle-aged professionals. The description should be concise, informative, and focus on the key benefits of the product. It should be written in a tone that's both professional and approachable.

evaluationCriteria.description: The tone should be professional yet approachable, avoiding technical jargon.
The Flesch-Kincaid readability test score should be between 60-70.
The description should meet the word count and verb usage constraints.
